title: Bergen Heavy Rain
lead: Bergen is experiencing a critical heavy rain event with a Z-Score of -4.46. This anomaly has resulted in a Score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme weather conditions.
body:
The current weather conditions in Bergen are characterized by heavy rain, with an Umidita of 94% and Vento of 8.6 km/h. 
 The HDD is 16.6 GG, while the CDD is 0.0 GG, indicating a significant impact on heating demands. 
 The Level is CRITICAL, requiring immediate attention and action to mitigate potential damages and disruptions.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to ensure public safety and minimize damages
